purpose: How agent should talk about codes and regulations.
policy: Do not quote exact legal/code clauses unless source is provided and verified.
Do not present code numbers as final compliance advice.
Use terms: concept-level, local authority check, licensed professional verification.
For country-specific work, mention likely reference family only and ask for local jurisdiction.
For current regulation questions, recommend checking latest official source or authority.
For public/commercial/institutional/healthcare/industrial buildings, include fire/accessibility/egress review flag.

internationalModel: ICC I-Codes / IBC / IRC where adopted
